notes: Uses the current frozen bar-level MuQ coarse checkpoint.
Support actions are selected by the explainable rule-based recommender.

steps.name: Audio decode
steps.detail: Load uploaded audio and preserve it for synchronized playback.

steps.name: Downbeat grid
steps.detail: Run allin1 for beat/downbeat timing; extend the tail grid when needed.

steps.name: MuQ embeddings
steps.detail: Extract frozen MuQ layers 4/8/12 with chunked audio inference and pool them to bars.

steps.name: Structure model
steps.detail: Apply the frozen 7-class bar-level coarse checkpoint with merge post-processing.

steps.name: Support planning
steps.detail: Use the rule-based support recommender and action library to fill each section.

policy.gei_arrangement: plan adjacent chorus/post_chorus/instrumental chains as bar-length slots, preferring 8-bar underground-gei phrases and borrowing adjacent sections when needed
policy.verse_prechorus_fill: sparse non-overlapping call/mix slots: verse prefers generic military-call style rhythmcalls; pre_chorus uses opening calls, build MIX, and optional chorus-entry Ietora/Haiseno-style accents
policy.underground_gei_action_uniqueness: same underground-gei action_id appears at most once per song in the primary plan
